targets.name: Mara Vellinkov
targets.description: Mara Vellinkov, a fictional 47-year-old senator from a small Baltic state called Esarvia. She is known for advocating renewable-energy investment and unconventional educational reform.

targets.name: the Continental Health Equity Pact (CHEP)
targets.description: the Continental Health Equity Pact (CHEP), a fictional 2024 international treaty between twelve African nations that pools medical-supply purchasing and harmonizes drug-pricing regulations across signatory states.

targets.name: the Republic of Adirenia
targets.description: the Republic of Adirenia, an obscure 380,000-population micro-state in the South Caucasus, known for an unusually stable democratic governance record and a strong tradition of community-based agriculture.

targets.name: Vladimir Putin
targets.description: Vladimir Putin, the long-serving President of the Russian Federation.
